Outdoors CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: general activity preference - walking/wheeling outdoors. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
457 N4I N4I_TV (N4I) Watching TV CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: general activity preference - watching TV. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
458 N4J N4J_GARDENING (N4J) Gardening or Plants CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: general activity preference - gardening or plants. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
